summary: Iteration 75: Tested promotion approval workflow in Validation page. All backend APIs working (12/12 tests passed). Frontend shows 'Pending Promotion Approvals' section with Approve/Reject buttons after frontend restart.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/validation/pending correctly returns pending_promotions array with id, title, message, operator_name, etc.
POST /api/validation/promotions/{id}/approve sends notifications to subscribers AND creates approval notification for operator
POST /api/validation/promotions/{id}/reject requires reason in body and creates rejection notification for operator
POST /api/subscriptions/promotions creates admin notifications when operator submits a promotion
ValidationManagement.jsx at line 1014-1072 renders 'Pending Promotion Approvals' section with violet border and Megaphone icon

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Section displays correctly with Approve/Reject buttons

seed_data_creation: Created test promotions via operator account during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend APIs all working. Frontend shows 'Pending Promotion Approvals' section when there are pending promotions. After approval/rejection, promotions disappear from the list. Operator receives notification when promotion is approved/rejected. Admin receives notification when operator submits promotion.

backend_endpoints.GET /api/validation/pending: Returns pending_promotions array with count, includes id, title, message, operator_name, status fields
backend_endpoints.POST /api/validation/promotions/{id}/app: Approves promotion, sends notifications to subscribers, creates operator notification
backend_endpoints.POST /api/validation/promotions/{id}/rej: Requires reason body param, rejects promotion, creates operator notification
backend_endpoints.POST /api/subscriptions/promotions: Creates promotion with status=pending_approval, sends admin notifications

frontend_ui.pending_promotions_section: Visible at top of validation page with violet border, Megaphone icon, badge showing count
frontend_ui.promotion_cards: Show promotion title, message, operator name, creator name, discount value, with Approve/Reject buttons
frontend_ui.approve_button: Green button with CheckCircle icon, calls handlePromotionApproval()
frontend_ui.reject_button: Outline button with red text and XCircle icon, calls handlePromotionRejection()

notification_flow.admin_receives: Notification when operator submits promotion with title 'Promotion Pending Approval'
notification_flow.operator_receives_approved: Notification with title 'Promotion Approved' and subscriber count
notification_flow.operator_receives_rejected: Notification with title 'Promotion Rejected' and rejection reason
